name: io.github.hbhqq9/bde-score
description: Multi-market stock analysis MCP server providing BDE scoring (fundamental, technical, ESG) for US, HK, and China A-share markets. Covers 3 major exchanges with unified methodology.

tools.name: get_bde_score
tools.description: Get comprehensive BDE Score for a stock including fundamental, technical, and ESG dimensions. Supports US, HK, and China A-share markets.

tools.name: get_multi_market_comparison
tools.description: Compare the same company across US/HK/CN markets with BDE scores for each listing.

tools.name: get_stock_screener
tools.description: Screen stocks by BDE score criteria across multiple markets with customizable filters.

tools.name: get_esg_analysis
tools.description: Detailed ESG (Environmental, Social, Governance) analysis for a specific stock.

tools.name: get_sector_analysis
tools.description: Sector-level analysis with average BDE scores and top performers by sector.
